next_steps: Endobronchial ultrasound-guided transbronchial needle aspiration (EBUS-TBNA) of mediastinal/hilar lymph nodes
Serum angiotensin-converting enzyme (ACE) and soluble interleukin-2 receptor levels
Biopsy of cutaneous lesions on the ankles
PET-CT scan to guide biopsy targets and assess systemic involvement
Comprehensive infectious disease workup (Bartonella serology/PCR, fungal cultures, QuantiFERON-TB Gold)
